title: Friendly Furnishings
description: Furniture and Block Catalogs to make your world cozy and cute!
body:
![A rectangle of red & tan gingham, with a centered smaller rectangle of tan, with the text Welcome to Friendly Furnishings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6cfe58403881e290fd5e30b00e207db4354e521.png)
**Friendly Furnishings** is a mod born from mornings in antique stores and 1950's home owners catalogues. Use a book, an emerald and some odds an ends to craft yourself a catalogue. Over **250** new blocks, furniture & decor are only an emerald away!

**Features**
- Wallpaper
- Tiles
- Pastel planks
- Matching Beadboard
- Matching kitchen sets; Roses, Stars, Blueberry Lemon, Garden, Seaglass, Hygge Green & Orange
- Working cabinets, countertops and containers
- Bathroom fixtures
- Vanity mirrors, both on odds and evens
- Dainty little flower lamps
- Lots more!

  **Dependencies: Geckolib**
  
![A rectangle of red & tan gingham, with a centered smaller rectangle of tan, with the text Frequently Asked Questions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eda7c80d8851aba4d78d3b384bffba1e159defa4.png)
**Q:** Are you planning to backport?

**A:** Backports are not planned at this time.

**Q:** Can I use this in a modpack, public server or video?

**A:** Yes! Just make sure to credit the mod and don't claim it as your own.

**Q:** Can you add XYZ?

**A:** This mod will continue to get updates for the foreseeable future and has some of that planned out. If you want some sneek peaks, join the discord!
